sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: VISA INC.는 2025-12-31 분기에 매출 109억 100만 달러를 기록했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 순매출은 전년 동기 대비 15% 증가했으며, 이는 명목 국경 간 거래량과 처리된 거래 건수 및 결제 물량의 성장에 기인합니다.

riskChanges.text: 인터체인지 다중지구 소송과 관련하여 707백만 달러의 추가 충당금을 기록했으며, 향후 소송 결과에 따라 추가적인 재무적 영향이 발생할 수 있습니다.

businessChanges.text: 비자넷(VisaNet) 네트워크를 통한 거래 처리 서비스 강화에 집중하고 있으며, 200개 이상의 국가에서 결제 생태계를 지원하고 있습니다.
비GAAP 기준 영업비용은 인건비, 마케팅, 일반 관리비 증가로 인해 전년 동기 대비 16% 증가했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 당기 매출은 109억 100만 달러, 영업이익은 67억 3,700만 달러, 순이익은 58억 5,300만 달러를 기록했습니다.
총자산은 968억 1,400만 달러이며, 현금 및 현금성 자산은 147억 5,600만 달러를 보유하여 안정적인 유동성을 유지하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 매출 성장세는 견조하나 소송 관련 일회성 비용이 영업이익률을 압박하고 있어, 향후 법적 리스크 해소 과정에서의 비용 통제 능력이 중요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: Quarter ended 2025-12-31 revenue = 109억 100만 달러 (USD 10.901B; 10,901 million), XBRL range 2025-10-01..2025-12-31.
Quarter ended 2025-12-31 operating income = 67억 3,700만 달러 (USD 6.737B; 6,737 million), XBRL range 2025-10-01..2025-12-31.
Quarter ended 2025-12-31 net income = 58억 5,300만 달러 (USD 5.853B; 5,853 million), XBRL range 2025-10-01..2025-12-31.
Quarter ended 2025-12-31 total assets = 968억 1,400만 달러 (USD 96.814B; 96,814 million), XBRL range instant..2025-12-31.
Quarter ended 2025-12-31 cash and cash equivalents = 147억 5,600만 달러 (USD 14.756B; 14,756 million), XBRL range instant..2025-12-31.

Overview Visa is a global payments technology company that facilitates secure, reliable and efficient global commerce and money movement. We provide transaction processing services (primarily authorization, clearing and settlement) among consumers, issuing and acquiring financial institutions and sellers. We are focused on extending, enhancing and investing in our proprietary advanced transaction processing network, VisaNet, to offer a single connection point for facilitating money movement to multiple endpoints through various form factors and innovative technologies across more than 200 countries and territories. Visa is not a financial institution. We do not issue cards, extend credit or set rates and fees for account holders of Visa products. Financial overview. A summary of our GAAP and non-GAAP operating results is as follows: Three Months Ended December 31, 2025 2024 % Change (1)

Highlights. For the three months ended December 31, 2025, net revenue increased 15% over the prior-year comparable period, primarily due to the growth in nominal cross-border volume, processed transactions and nominal payments volume, partially offset by higher client incentives. See

Operating Expenses below for further discussion. For the three months ended December 31, 2025, exchange rate movements increased our operating expense growth by approximately one-and-a-half percentage points. For the three months ended December 31, 2025, non-GAAP operating expenses increased 16% over the prior-year comparable period, primarily driven by higher personnel, marketing, and general and administrative expenses. Interchange multidistrict litigation . For the three months ended December 31, 2025, we recorded an additional accrual of $707 million to address claims associated with the interchange multidistrict litigation. We also made a deposit of $500 million into the U. S. litigation escrow account. The additional accrual related to the interchange multidistrict litigation could be higher or lower than the deposit made into the U.S. litigation escrow account. See Note 4—U.S. and Readable Korean unit: 7억 700만 달러, 5억 달러.
